title: Only + 副詞/子句 + 助動詞 + S + V（only 倒裝）

formulas.formula: Only + 副詞/副詞片語 + 助動詞 + S + V
formulas.zh: 只有在...時/經過...後，主詞才會...（副詞修飾引發倒裝）

formulas.formula: Only + 子句 + 主句倒裝（Only when/after/by + clause, aux + S + V）
formulas.zh: 只有當...時，主詞才會...（時間或條件子句引發倒裝）

explanation: Only 修飾副詞、副詞片語或時間/條件子句時，置於句首會引發主句倒裝。倒裝形式為：助動詞提前至主詞之前。此句型常見搭配包括 only then、only when、only after、only by 等。倒裝強調了 only 所修飾成分的限制性和重要性，表示「只有在該條件/時間點」才會發生該動作。注意不能與其他倒裝句混淆，only 修飾主詞時則無倒裝。

examples.eng: Only then did we realize the importance of teamwork and cooperation.
examples.chi: 只有到那時我們才意識到團隊合作的重要性。

examples.eng: Only when you practice consistently will you improve your English skills.
examples.chi: 只有當你持續練習時，你的英文能力才會進步。

examples.eng: Only after graduation did he understand what his parents had sacrificed.
examples.chi: 只有在畢業後，他才明白父母所做的犧牲。

examples.eng: Only by learning from mistakes can we become wiser and more responsible.
examples.chi: 只有通過從錯誤中學習，我們才能變得更聰慧和負責任。

extension.tip: 判斷倒裝：Only 後接副詞/片語/子句置句首時必倒裝，助動詞提前。若 only 修飾主詞或受詞則不倒裝。易錯點是忘記倒裝或倒裝形式錯誤。記得時態和助動詞要與原句相符。

examples.test: Only yesterday did I discover this amazing restaurant.
examples.result: → 正確倒裝。Only + 時間副詞在句首，主句倒裝。

examples.test: ✗ Only I know the secret. (我是唯一知道秘密的人)
examples.result: → Only 修飾主詞「I」，不引發倒裝。保持正常語序。

examples.test: Only if you study hard will you pass the exam.
examples.result: → 正確倒裝。Only if + 條件子句引發主句倒裝。

extension.note: Only + 副詞/片語/子句在句首 → 主句倒裝（助動詞前移）；Only 修飾主詞或受詞 → 無倒裝。

parts: I understand what true friendship means.
exercises.sentence: Only then did I understand what true friendship means.
exercises.translation: 只有到那時，我才明白真摯友誼的真正含義。

parts: we achieve great success in this project.
exercises.sentence: Only when we work together can we achieve great success in this project.
exercises.translation: 只有當我們一起工作時，我們才能在這個項目中取得巨大成功。

parts: Only after years of hard work and dedication
exercises.sentence: Only after years of hard work and dedication did she become a professional dancer.
exercises.translation: 只有經過多年的努力和奉獻，她才成為一名專業舞者。

parts: we expand our knowledge and broaden our horizons.
exercises.sentence: Only by reading widely can we expand our knowledge and broaden our horizons.
exercises.translation: 只有通過廣泛閱讀，我們才能擴展知識和開闊視野。
